title: Proclamation No. 531, s. 1940
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 531

RESERVING FOR RAILROAD PURPOSES A PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF BOLO, MUNICIPALITY OF VICTORIA, PROVINCE OF TARLAC, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for railroad purposes, under the administration of the Manila Railroad Company, subject to private lights, if any there be, the following parcel of the public domain, situated in the barrio of Bolo, municipality of Victoria, Province of Tarlac, island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Psd-4019, to wit:

A parcel of land (Lot No. 5664-A of the subdivision plan Psd-4012, being a portion of Lot No. 5664 of the cadastral survey of Victoria, G. L. R. O. Cad. Record No. 225), situated in the barrio of Bolo, municipality of Victoria, Province of Tarlac. Bounded on the E., by Lot No. 1961-A of plan Psd-4020; on the SE., by Lot No. 5651-A of plan Psd-4018: on the SW., by a road; and on the NW., by Lot No. 5664-B of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1 on plan, being N. 19° 30′ W., 662.82 meters, more or less. from B B M. No. 9 of Victoria Cadastre; thence S. ft 57′ W., 30.90 m. to point “2”; thence N. 8° 03′ W., 6.72In. to point “3”; thence N. 47° 05′ E., 48.46 m. to point 4 ; thence S. 1° 46′ E., 29.46 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of six hundred and sixty square meters (660), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, point “1” is marked by old P. L. S./B.L. concrete monument 15 x 15 x 60 cm.; point “2” by B. L. concrete monument 15 cm. diam. X 60 cm.; and points “3” and “4” by P. L. S./M. R. concrete monuments 18 cm. diam. X 72 cm.; bearings true; declination 0° 42’ E.; date of the original survey, May 1917-November , 1918; and that of the subdivision survey, March 4-July 13, 1928.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this first day of April, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fifth.

(Sgd.) MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: (Sgd.) JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
